slides.text: This quote is often attributed to Albert Einstein:

"If the bee disappears off the surface of the globe,

then man would have only four years of life left."
The last bee disappeared long ago.

Crops failed.

Ecosystem collapsed.

Humanity retreated underground.
Governments and scientists searched desperately for a solution.
Before the final migration, scientists gathered what remained:
and the last fragments of a dying world.
Humanity did not disappear because nature failed...
